name: RepoWhisper
stack: Swift, SwiftUI, Python, FastAPI, Whisper, LanceDB
bullets: Built macOS menu bar app enabling voice-to-code search with sub-300ms end-to-end latency: audio capture (100ms) + Whisper transcription (120ms) + MPS-accelerated embedding (20ms) + vector search (5ms)
Engineered stealth overlay invisible to Zoom/Teams screen sharing using NSPanel; optimized for Apple Silicon M2 with float16 Whisper models and Metal Performance Shaders
Implemented 3 indexing modes (manual, smart, full) with LanceDB vector database; 167 commits, MIT licensed

name: VibeGuard
bullets: Built npm CLI with 43+ detection rules across 11 security categories; scanned 8,955 files across 3 popular repos finding 838 vulnerabilities (581 critical) at 2,500 files/sec
Integrated GitHub Actions for automated PR scanning with optional auto-fix; designed allowlist workflow achieving sub-2\% false positive rate

name: VetTriage
bullets: Shipped production PWA with real-time voice transcription, automatic speaker diarization, and AI analysis generating structured veterinary intake reports with confidence scores (0.0-1.0)
Implemented global rate limiting (2s intervals), single-flight locks preventing duplicate API calls, offline-first architecture via service workers; 43 commits

name: Nexus
bullets: Shipped multi-agent SaaS where 4 AI agents (Clarifier, Drafter, Critic, Finalizer) collaborate via LangGraph; sub-200ms API response, 30-90s refinement cycles
Engineered AES-256-GCM envelope encryption for API keys, 20+ row-level security policies, rate limiting via Upstash Redis (10-100 req/min by endpoint)

name: SuperCoder (SABS)
bullets: Implemented novel algorithm embedding static security analysis into LLM beam search decoding; score = log\_prob - lambda * security\_penalty with tri-state parsing for partial code
Built LRU cache achieving 632K cached ops/sec; HumanEval 68\% baseline to 65\% with security (95\% accuracy, 100\% precision). ArXiv paper in preparation

name: Dost
bullets: Built Dost (Rahul-sch/Dost), a multi-language GitHub repository focused on implementing and experimenting with core application features and utilities
Implemented modular project structure with reusable components, emphasizing clean separation of concerns across the codebase
Added end-to-end functionality and supporting scripts/configuration to streamline local development, testing, and iteration

name: skill.sh
bullets: Built skill.sh, a local iterative prompt-refinement engine that chains Claude $\to$ GPT-4 $\to$ Gemini across N passes to turn rough ideas into polished, structured prompts

Designed a multi-model pipeline with configurable model order and iteration count (e.g., \texttt{--models claude,gpt4,gemini} and \texttt{--iterations 3}) to progressively add context, structure, and research depth
Added automatic session persistence to timestamped JSON artifacts capturing original prompt, per-pass outputs, elapsed times, and the final refined result

name: quant-vis-skill
bullets: Built \texttt{quant-vis-skill}, a visualization/analysis module for exploring and presenting market/financial signals across time-series
Implemented core pipelines to ingest datasets, compute derived metrics, and transform raw time-series into visualization-ready features (cleaning, normalization, resampling)
Created reusable plotting/visual components (charts/dashboards) to compare strategies, distributions, and performance over time with configurable parameters

name: Shadow Clone (OpenClaw)
bullets: Built an OpenClaw skill (``Shadow Clone'') that scaffolds a FastAPI webhook server to intercept Discord/Telegram trading signals and auto-route them into a paper trader or Alpaca execution flow
Implemented a sub-200ms, regex-first signal parser with confidence scoring to normalize ticker/direction/entry/stop-loss/take-profit across multiple real-world message formats
Designed risk-control gates (max position sizing, daily loss limits, ticker allowlist, cooldowns, duplicate detection) with SQLite-backed audit logging for every signal and resulting order

name: Tele-GoldBCH
bullets: Built Tele-GoldBCH, a Python day-trader combining Goldbach Bounce + continuation/meta-filter strategy signals with risk controls and audit logging
Integrated Alpaca (US-compliant paper trading; historical + live candles), optional TradingView CDP chart ingestion, and Telegram alert delivery; automated bootstrap via \texttt{run.sh}
Developed a Next.js 15 + TypeScript + Tailwind mobile dashboard polling Redis-backed API routes to display live bot status, positions, and performance, with start/stop command dispatch via Redis keys
